title: 'ahal #0167
definition:
1) to pitch a tent, to move a tent
    1a) (Qal) pitch or remove a tent
    1a) (Piel) to pitch one's tent
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to pitch a tent, to move a tent
    1a) (Qal) pitch or remove a tent
    1a) (Piel) to pitch one's tent

    NASB:  to move a tent (from place to place)
